title: Speed Demon Origins
description: A very epic mod that adds epic origins such as Speed Demon, Jack'O Lantern and with more to come!
body:
**This mod adds 2 Origins named Speed Demon and Jack'O Lantern for now with more to come later.
Here is all the Powers and Origins that the mod has currently:**

**_CAUTION: THIS MOD REQUIRES PEHKUI TO USE_**


**Speed Demon (Impact 2):**

![Speed demon description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac9cddc16c3aa11b2577d6076893232a3f25d720.png)

_**- Description: The physical form of speed, you held immense power and speed nobody will ever catch up to you but you are far away from your true form, seek revenge in the end and awaken your true self.**_

- Heightened Reflexes: Your accelerated reflexes allows you to  react faster to any upcoming attacks and allowing you to completely dodge any attack.
- Sensetive Body: Your body wasn't meant for fighting and combat, but rather for running and evading attacks. Due to this, your body is more sensitive than a normal humans body.
- Burdened By Armor: Your feather-like, lightweight body cannot handle too much pressure. For this reason, wearing too much armor reduces your mobility.
- Smooth Landing: Just like cats, you can also use similar techniques to always land safely and smoothly, completely evading fall damage.
- Quick Hands: Your accelerated muscles allows you to mine everything quicker and attack faster. (requires pehkui)
- Lightning Speed: Your lightning-fast legs allow you to move much quicker and jump much higher than a normal human can.
- Blink (Primary Ability): When they said 'lightning-fast,' the rumors were true. You can use your lightning powers to instantly teleport! (Teleport 10 blocks forward)
- Slim Body: Your body is smaller than a normal human’s body, allowing you to dodge attacks more easily. (requires Pehkui)
- Frictionless Movement: Your immune system will instantly counteract any effect that will slow down your muscles.


**_EVERYTHING BELOW THIS TEXT IS ARCHIEVED_**


**Jack'O Lantern (2 Impact):**

![Jack'O Lantern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38629bc06ac3338a86cb44e4a5b9cfb8c76c4624.png)

**_- Description: The halloween spirit came back from the death to harvest souls in this world during Halloween._**

- Axe Curse: You'll always spawn with a iron axe.
- Fire Resistance: You are immune to fire.
- Head Throw (Primary Ability): Throw you head at your enemies!
- Jack's Curse: You have a Jack O'Lantern head and you cant get rid of it.
- Enemy of Christmas: Being in cold biomes or anywhere that is snowing will constantly hurt you.
- Moonlight: While under the moon light, you deal more damage, run faster, break blocks faster and deal more damage but these effects are reversed during daytime.
- Soul Harvest: Harvest souls by killing living being.
Each kill will increase your maximum health for some time and give you regeneration but be aware that the souls you collected doesn't last forever.
- Aquaphobia: You can't swim
- Halloween's Curse: You have less hp but you set mobs on fire after hitting them.
- Weak Muscles: You have slept for years for that reason your muscles are weakened causing you to deal less damage and not be able to use your fist for combat.
